mapper.sql: ro_id, ro_source, bind_order_id, ro_type, sub_order_id, warehouse_code, ro_status, carried, express_code, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, customer_no, invoice_no, supplier_id, trans_type, wms_status, match_pco_id, version, order_id, order_item
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_ro_bak
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_ro_bak (ro_id, ro_source, bind_order_id, ro_type, sub_order_id, warehouse_code, ro_status, carried, express_code, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, customer_no, invoice_no, supplier_id, trans_type, wms_status, match_pco_id, version, order_id, order_item ) values (#{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wmsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{matchPcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_ro_bak
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_source = #{record.roSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bind_order_id = #{record.bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_type = #{record.roType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_order_id = #{record.subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_status = #{record.roStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wms_status = #{record.wmsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
match_pco_id = #{record.matchPcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_ro_bak set ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_source = #{record.roSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bind_order_id = #{record.bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_type = #{record.roType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_order_id = #{record.subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_status = #{record.roStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wms_status = #{record.wmsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, match_pco_id = #{record.matchPcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_ro_bak
ro_source = #{roSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bind_order_id = #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_type = #{roType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_order_id = #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_status = #{roStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wms_status = #{wmsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
match_pco_id = #{matchPcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_ro_bak set ro_source = #{roSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bind_order_id = #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_type = #{roType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_order_id = #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_status = #{roStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wms_status = #{wmsStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, match_pco_id = #{matchPcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
